rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA JOAN FARMER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel San Jose Water Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, December 16, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel San Jose Water Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents: the parties have continued this motion multiple times. If any issues remain, by 4:30pm today the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain unresolved and then appear at the hearing at 9am on December 21. = (220/JSR)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS HRUSKA et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling The Custodian Of Records For Medicare To Produce Records Of Dennis L. Hruska
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, December 16, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Designated Defense Counsel¿s Motion for Order Compelling the Custodian of Records for Medicare to Produce Records for Medicare to Produce Records of Dennis L. Hruska is denied. Designated Defense Counsel failed to show that it has exhausted meet and confer efforts to obtain the Medicare authorization from Plaintiffs. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions is denied. If a hearing is requested, it will be conducted in Department 220, Hon. Jeffrey S. Ross presiding. In the event of a hearing Plaintiff is ordered to produce a copy of the Medicare authorization form previously provided to Berry & Berry, as reflected in the Declaration of Douglas Dukelow. = (220/JSR)
